workspace.note: The audit intentionally reflects the current local workspace, including uncommitted drift.

adminSamples.command: TEST_REUSE_EXISTING_SERVER=1 npx playwright test tests/admin-v3-canary-runtime.spec.js -g "arranca por defecto con shell queue-first y assets v3 unicos" --workers=1
TEST_REUSE_EXISTING_SERVER=1 npx playwright test tests/admin-callbacks-triage.spec.js -g "atajos globales aplican filtros y slash enfoca busqueda" --workers=1
TEST_REUSE_EXISTING_SERVER=1 npx playwright test tests/admin.spec.js -g "settings guarda el perfil del medico principal y sube la firma digital" --workers=1

reliable: curl against the local PHP server

defects.title: Orchestrator diagnostics are stubbed
defects.finding: All three commands return redirect-stub-v3-canonical instead of live board diagnostics.

defects.title: Active claim overlap on critical zones
defects.finding: Overlaps exist on public_pages, config, lib, and fragile file api.php.

defects.title: Expired and orphaned claims remain live
defects.finding: 3 expired claims and 3 orphaned claims are still present.

defects.title: Repository hygiene is degraded
defects.finding: 54 worktrees, 20 dirty, 12 blocked; root worktree itself is blocked and mixed-lane.

defects.title: Persisted QA summary is stale/misleading
defects.finding: qa-summary says GREEN while the live audit is RED with 5 failed checks.

defects.title: Live OpenClaw routes are undocumented
defects.finding: saveChronicCondition, closeTelemedicine, and fastClose exist live but not in the YAML.

defects.title: Observability endpoints return 500
defects.finding: Both endpoints currently answer HTTP 500 with a generic internal error payload.

defects.title: Admin CSP blocks its own runtime and assets
defects.finding: admin.html uses self-only CSP while loading Chart.js, Google Fonts, inline scripts, and inline styles that CSP blocks.

defects.title: Root assets referenced by admin and legacy surfaces are missing
defects.finding: styles/tokens.css, styles/base.css, and /release-manifest.json are missing at root but still referenced.

defects.title: Admin boot and data contracts are broken
evidence: TEST_REUSE_EXISTING_SERVER=1 npx playwright test tests/admin-v3-canary-runtime.spec.js -g "arranca por defecto con shell queue-first y assets v3 unicos" --workers=1
TEST_REUSE_EXISTING_SERVER=1 npx playwright test tests/admin-callbacks-triage.spec.js -g "atajos globales aplican filtros y slash enfoca busqueda" --workers=1
TEST_REUSE_EXISTING_SERVER=1 npx playwright test tests/admin.spec.js -g "settings guarda el perfil del medico principal y sube la firma digital" --workers=1
defects.finding: Observed failures include hidden workbench, empty callbacks grid, and admin-ready remaining false.

defects.title: Public home contract drift between reborn shell and V6 test/runtime markers
defects.finding: The route is still tagged home_v6, but it no longer exposes the data-v6 markers required by tests and runtime helpers.

defects.title: Public mobile layout and drawer are regressed
defects.finding: Telemedicine overflows horizontally on 360px mobile and the home drawer open hook is missing.

defects.title: Clarity does not load after accepting cookies
defects.finding: After accepting cookies the expected Clarity script and loaded flag do not appear.

defects.title: Sprint 30 booking smoke no longer matches /es/agendar/
defects.finding: The route now renders with data-theme-mode=system and a white theme-color where the smoke still expects dark mode.

brokenTestMatrix.command: TEST_REUSE_EXISTING_SERVER=1 npx playwright test tests/admin-v3-canary-runtime.spec.js -g "arranca por defecto con shell queue-first y assets v3 unicos" --workers=1
TEST_REUSE_EXISTING_SERVER=1 npx playwright test tests/admin-callbacks-triage.spec.js -g "atajos globales aplican filtros y slash enfoca busqueda" --workers=1
TEST_REUSE_EXISTING_SERVER=1 npx playwright test tests/admin.spec.js -g "settings guarda el perfil del medico principal y sube la firma digital" --workers=1

failures: homepage.spec.js: renders the V6 shell and core editorial surfaces on ES home
homepage.spec.js: hero controls switch the active V6 slide
homepage.spec.js: home boots V6 runtime without legacy runtime markers
homepage.spec.js: spanish home exposes the Google Maps reviews block with a clinic listing CTA
brokenTestMatrix.likelyRootCause: home_v6 contract drift vs reborn shell

failures: cookie-consent.spec.js: Clarity only loads after accepting cookies
brokenTestMatrix.likelyRootCause: analytics runtime config or loader gap

first10Fixes: Restore a live source of truth for governance diagnostics instead of redirect-stub-v3-canonical.
Clear expired/orphaned claims and resolve api.php/config/lib/public_pages overlaps.
Split or park current mixed-lane root changes before broad fixes.
Repair health-diagnostics and monitoring-config so runtime observability works again.
Align admin.html CSP with the resources and inline behaviors it actually uses.
Restore or retire root references to styles/tokens.css, styles/base.css, and /release-manifest.json.
Fix admin boot state first: data-admin-ready, visible workbench, and callbacks hydration.
Choose one canonical contract for /es/: either restore data-v6 markers or update helpers/tests/runtime to reborn.
Fix public mobile overflow and drawer behavior.
Close OpenAPI drift and start burning down verify evidence/rule debt.
